title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Jio Platforms - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Jio Platforms - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jio Platforms family as a Backend Developer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jio Platforms:
Jio Platforms is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms!
